name: Veepo.ca

product.name: Portfolio Website Template
product.core_promise: I build websites that make the phone ring.
product.tagline: Two weeks from now, your website is live and working for you.

target_audience.secondary: videographers, artists, creative freelancers, brand photographers
target_audience.pain_point: Their work is premium but their website makes them look amateur — costing them better clients, higher rates, and destination opportunities
target_audience.dream_outcome: A premium portfolio that makes dream clients trust their price before the first call — and opens doors to destination weddings, brand campaigns, and international work
target_audience.identity_tension: They see themselves as an artist, but they know they need to look like a business
target_audience.buying_trigger: "I'm good enough to charge more, but I don't look like it online."
dream_inbox: We're launching a boutique hotel in Tulum and love your style.
Would you travel to Italy for our wedding weekend?
Our agency is looking for a lifestyle photographer for a campaign.
Can we book you for a brand shoot in New York?
We found your portfolio and think you'd be perfect for this project.

persona.name: Portfolio-to-Passport Photographer
persona.career_stage: 2-8 years in, past beginner, not fully premium yet
persona.current_presence: Instagram-heavy, maybe an outdated Squarespace/Wix site, maybe nothing
persona.the_moment: A potential client asks 'Do you have a website?' and they pause — because they either send Instagram, a Google Drive folder, or a site they secretly hate.
before_state: My Instagram looks good, but it doesn't tell the full story.
I feel embarrassed sending people my current website.
I know I should charge more, but my brand doesn't look expensive enough yet.
People love my photos, but I'm still getting low-budget inquiries.
I'm tired of relying only on referrals and DMs.
I want to travel for photography, but my brand still looks local.
after_state: Book higher-quality clients who already trust them before the first call
Attract destination weddings, luxury travel shoots, brand campaigns, hotel work
Feel proud when someone asks for their website
Stop feeling behind compared to other photographers
Turn photography into a lifestyle, not just a service
objections: Can I justify spending $799 right now?
Couldn't I just make something in Squarespace?
I don't have time to organize all my photos.
Am I premium enough for this yet?
Will this actually look like me?
persona.emotional_transformation: "I finally look like the photographer I know I'm becoming."

tone: Parker is the voice — not the brand
always_do: write as Parker — first person singular, founder voice
lead with the outcome or the transformation
use specific numbers when possible ($799, 14 days, $69/month)
speak the photographer's language: bookings, inquiries, galleries, shoots, clients, sessions, album delivery
name the gap between their talent and their presentation
end with a CTA: DM me WEBSITE or link in first comment

pain: Your best work should not be buried six posts deep on Instagram.
If your photos look premium but your website does not, high-value clients feel the mismatch.
A dream client should not have to scroll, guess, or DM just to understand what you do.
Your portfolio should make your price feel natural.
desire: Imagine sending one link and instantly looking like the obvious choice.
Imagine a couple in Italy, a boutique hotel in Tulum, or a fashion brand in New York landing on your site and thinking: 'This is the photographer.'
Your website should feel like the beginning of a bigger chapter.
Built for photographers ready to move from local bookings to premium opportunities.
identity: You are not just taking photos. You are building a visual brand.
Look like the photographer your future clients are already searching for.
Stop presenting yourself like a freelancer. Start presenting yourself like a premium creative.
You don't wait until you're premium to look premium. You look premium so better clients can recognize you.
hooks: Your photos already look expensive. Your website should too.
Turn your portfolio into a premium booking asset.
Stop sending dream clients to a scattered Instagram page.
Build the website that makes clients trust your price before they meet you.
Look destination-ready before the destination client finds you.

conversion_layers: Attention: open with an uncomfortable truth, exact client moment, money gap, status gap, or the website question that makes them pause.
Identification: use their real world - Instagram grid, Linktree, old Squarespace/Wix site, Google Drive folder, Pixieset, client galleries, DMs, Lightroom, destination work, undercharging.
Pain: name the cost of weak presentation - lower perceived value, low-budget inquiries, lost trust, looking local, and clients choosing someone who looks more established.
Mechanism: explain why the website works - controlled first impression, curated portfolio, premium framing, professional inquiry path, trust before the call, and one clean link.
Offer: make Veepo the obvious next step - $799 launch, live in 14 days, $69/month managed, done-for-you, no DIY website rabbit hole.
Action: close with one clear CTA - DM me WEBSITE, Link in first comment, or Reply WEBSITE and I will show you what yours could look like.

ideas: Real screenshot of the Veepo photography template hero with overlay: Your photos already look expensive. Your website should too.
Split-screen comparison: scattered Instagram profile vs premium mobile portfolio.
Google Drive folder vs clean website gallery comparison.
Mobile homepage screenshot showing what a client sees after clicking from Instagram.
Contact form screenshot showing the difference between a DM and a serious inquiry path.
Business card website template screenshot paired with copy about one clean professional link.
Gallery grid screenshot with overlay: Your work deserves a better frame.
Simple text overlay on dark slate: I am good enough to charge more. I just do not look like it online yet.

proof_points: $799 — less than one missed booking from a dream client
$69/month managed: no tech headaches, no maintenance, no figuring it out alone
Built specifically for portfolio industries — not adapted from a generic business theme
One link that makes serious clients understand: this photographer is ready
offer_post_structure: 1. COST OF INACTION — Open with the dollar value of one missed premium booking ($3k-$20k destination wedding, $8k brand campaign, $12k hotel lifestyle shoot). Make the math visceral.

2. VALUE STACK — List every component of the $799 separately: full portfolio design, gallery, copy structure, mobile optimization, contact page, SEO basics, live in 14 days, done-for-you. Each line is its own paragraph.
3. TIME COMPRESSION — Emphasize 14 days and done-for-you. No DIY rabbit hole. No learning Squarespace. You send the work, Parker builds everything.
4. RISK REVERSAL — Worst case scenario if this doesn't work: you still have a professional portfolio website. State this directly.
5. THE MATH — One additional premium client per year. That's it. That's the entire ROI case. One client pays for multiple years of $69/month. Make the math undeniable.
6. SINGLE CTA — End with exactly one action: DM me WEBSITE or Reply WEBSITE and I will show you what yours could look like.
